kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/store/order path_url=/v2/store/order headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '138', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"id": "1213", "petId": "12450899002", "quantity": "1", "shipDate": "2026-06-10T23:15:00.732Z", "status": "delivered", "complete": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/store/order/1213 path_url=/v2/store/order/1213 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: DELETE
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/store/order/1213 path_url=/v2/store/order/1213 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
